mapper.select: SELECT * FROM points_rules ORDER BY scope, name
SELECT * FROM points_rules WHERE active = true ORDER BY scope, name
SELECT * FROM points_rules WHERE trigger_event = #{triggerEvent} AND active = true LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO points_rules (name, description, points, scope, trigger_event, active) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{points}, #{scope}, #{triggerEvent}, #{active})
